case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SHAYA GEUDER

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GEUDER, SHAYA DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GEUDER, SHAYA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEUDER, SHAYA DOES 1-5 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 21 CLARENCE PLACE #316, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEUDER, SHAYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 21 CLARENCE PLACE, #316, SAN FRANCISCO $805.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $378.58 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,583.58, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
